hibernate-mapping.query: Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet where txnRet.Company =:sourceCompany and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd !=:excludedStatus

Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet where txnRet.Company =:sourceCompany and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd !=:excludedStatus and mmTxn.Id = txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id = mmTxn.Id and (finTxn.CreditBankAccount =:bankAccount or finTxn.DebitBankAccount =:bankAccount)

Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet where txnRet.Company = :sourceCompany and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatus and txnRet.BankReturnCd like :returnCdWithPercentSigns

Select distinct txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where txnRet.Company = :company and mmTxn.Id = txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id and mmTxn.Company = :company and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id = mmTxn.Id and finTxn.PayrollRun.Id=payrollRun.Id and payrollRun.Company = :company and payrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId
Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet where txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction = :moneyMovementTx and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd !=:excludedStatus

Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturnBatch as txnRetBatch, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn where (comp.SourceSystemCd =:sourceSystemCd or :sourceSystemCd is null) and (comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId or :sourceCompanyId is null) and (comp.FedTaxIdEnc in (:feinEncList) or 'NONE' in (:feinEncList)) and ((txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd1 or :returnStatusCd1 is null) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd2) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd3) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd4)) and (txnRetBatch.ReturnDate >= :fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (txnRetBatch.ReturnDate <= :toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and txnRet.ReturnBatch.Id = txnRetBatch.Id and mmTxn.Id = txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id and mmTxn.Company.Id = comp.Id order by txnRetBatch.ReturnDate,txnRet.Id

Select count(*) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturnBatch as txnRetBatch, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn where (comp.SourceSystemCd =:sourceSystemCd or :sourceSystemCd is null) and (comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId or :sourceCompanyId is null) and (comp.FedTaxIdEnc in (:feinEncList) or 'NONE' in (:feinEncList)) and ((txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd1 or :returnStatusCd1 is null) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd2) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd3) or (txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :returnStatusCd4)) and (txnRetBatch.ReturnDate >= :fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (txnRetBatch.ReturnDate <= :toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and txnRet.ReturnBatch.Id = txnRetBatch.Id and mmTxn.Id = txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id and mmTxn.Company.Id = comp.Id

Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet where txnRet.ReturnBatch.Id =:txnRetBatchId and txnRet.BankReturnCd like :returnCdWithPercentSigns and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd = :txnRetStatusCd

Select txnRet from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturn as txnRet, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionType as txnType where mmTxn.Id = txnRet.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id and txnRet.Company = :company and txnRet.ReturnStatusCd !=:excludedStatus and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id = mmTxn.Id and finTxn.TransactionType = txnType.TransactionTypeCd and txnType.TransactionCategory !=:txnCategory
Select txnRetBatch from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.TransactionReturnBatch as txnRetBatch where to_char(txnRetBatch.ReturnDate,'yyyyMMdd') =:returnDate order by txnRetBatch.CreatedDate
